name: Little Red Riding Hood and Tentacles (Female POV)
description:
You always wore a red hood, and because of this, everyone called you "Little Red Riding Hood." It wasn’t until you came of age that your mother revealed the truth: you have a grandmother who is a witch, ageless and unrelated by blood. When you were tasked with visiting her in the forest, you discovered the forest had become dangerous and eerie. In the end, you discover that Grandma Lisa is trapped by the tentacle tree...

[A straightforward and familiar erotic scene, adapted from a well-known fairy tale. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]
